title: Copying Chinese characters will result in garbled text.
body: Does this issue occur when all extensions are disabled?: Yes/No - VS Code Version: - OS Version: Steps to Reproduce: 1. 打开终端 复制任意中文文字 2. 直接变成乱码 这个显示是从VSCodeUserSetup-x64-1.122.1之后的更新开始的
comments: ## AI Translation: ### Title: Copying Chinese characters will result in garbled text. ### Body: Does this issue occur when all extensions are disabled?: Yes/No - VS Code Version: - OS Version: Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open the terminal and copy any Chinese text 2. It immediately turns into garbled text. This display issue started appearing after the VSCodeUserSetup-x64-1.122.1 update. > Generated by [Issue Triage](https://github.com/microsoft/vscode-engineering/actions/runs/27517855211) · 510.5 AIC · ⌖ 46.9 AIC · ⊞ 21.8K · [◷](https://github.com/search?q=repo%3Amicrosoft%2Fvscode+%22gh-aw-workflow-call-id%3A+microsoft%2Fvscode-engineering%2Fissue-triage%22&type=issues)

Does this issue occur when all extensions are disabled?: Yes

VS Code Version: 1.122.1 (working), 1.122.1 +  (broken)
OS Version: Windows 11

Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open VSCode integrated terminal (pwsh7)
2. Run OpenCode TUI application
3. Select Chinese text and copy, or use /copy command
4. Paste anywhere - Chinese is garbled, English is fine
5. Same operation works correctly in IDEA terminal
After I tried downgrading VS Code to 1.121.0, I found there were no Chinese garbled characters.

> After I tried downgrading VS Code to 1.121.0, I found there were no Chinese garbled characters.

yes i tried too so after 1.122.1,there were many qusitions
Can you guys still repro on the latest insiders? [Insiders build](https://code.visualstudio.com/insiders)
